payload_summary.brief_title: Alleviation by Fisetin of Frailty, Inflammation, and Related Measures in Older Adults
payload_summary.official_title: AFFIRM-LITE: A Phase 2 Randomized, Placebo-Controlled Study of Alleviation by Fisetin of Frailty, Inflammation, and Related Measures in Older Adults
payload_summary.population: Adults age 70 years or older with frailty and inflammation-related eligibility context.
payload_summary.primary_outcome: Decrease in blood inflammation markers at seven days

access_policy.basis: ClinicalTrials.gov v2 public registry API was queried for a bounded surveillance pass; the retained snapshot record preserves the API URL, content hash, and registry status/results summary.

raw_storage.reason_not_stored: No separate raw-payload artifact path was declared for this bounded coverage-repair job; the source snapshot record retains the API URL, SHA-256 hash, and source-backed status/results summary.
